explanations.VERIFIABILITY: The term 'fast' is subjective and has no measurable metric.
explanations.AMBIGUITY: 'Fast' can mean different things to different stakeholders.
explanations.COMPLETENESS: Missing condition, and expected result. Only states a vague action.
explanations.TRACEABLE: No reference to any stakeholder, use case or business rule.

text: The system must respond to search queries in less than 1.5 seconds for 95% of requests under a load of 100 concurrent users

explanations.TRACEABLE: No reference to any stakeholder, use case or business rule.

text: The system must allow users to register and delete accounts

explanations.VERIFIABILITY: Registration and deletion are testable but no specific conditions are defined.
explanations.ATOMICITY: Contains two independent requirements joined by 'and': register and delete.
explanations.AMBIGUITY: 'Users' is not defined. Could refer to any role in the system.
explanations.COMPLETENESS: Missing the triggering condition and expected result for each action.
explanations.TRACEABLE: No reference to any stakeholder, use case or business rule.

text: The system must encrypt user passwords

explanations.VERIFIABILITY: Encryption is testable but no algorithm or standard is specified.
explanations.AMBIGUITY: 'Encrypt' could mean different algorithms with different security levels.
explanations.COMPLETENESS: Missing which encryption standard to use and under what conditions.
explanations.TRACEABLE: No reference to any stakeholder, use case or business rule.

text: The system must encrypt user passwords using bcrypt with a minimum work factor of 12 before storing them in the database

explanations.TRACEABLE: No reference to any stakeholder, use case or business rule.

text: The system must be easy to use and also secure

explanations.VERIFIABILITY: Neither 'easy to use' nor 'secure' have measurable metrics.
explanations.ATOMICITY: Contains two independent requirements joined by 'and also'.
explanations.AMBIGUITY: Both 'easy to use' and 'secure' are subjective and open to interpretation.
explanations.COMPLETENESS: Missing condition, action detail and expected result for both ideas.
explanations.TRACEABLE: No reference to any stakeholder, use case or business rule.

text: When a registered user submits a payment, the system must generate a unique order number and send a confirmation email to the registered address within 30 seconds [UC-05, Stakeholder: customer]

explanations.ATOMICITY: Contains two actions: generating an order number and sending a confirmation email. Could be split into two requirements.

explanations.VERIFIABILITY: No metric or condition defined to verify error handling.
explanations.AMBIGUITY: 'Handle errors' is vague. Could mean logging, displaying messages, retrying or ignoring.
explanations.COMPLETENESS: Missing which errors, under what conditions and what the expected behavior is.
explanations.TRACEABLE: No reference to any stakeholder, use case or business rule.
